TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Kulu, title = Kulu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kulu} }

S.FORM: == Kulu == alang Kulu ga niya mki sku Girang Keng atu Tayto go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 75 buwan, 235 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 80% kyan ku 187 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 20% kyan ku 48 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 72%, Amis 1%, Truku 1%, Puyuma 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Kulu hya' ga Qalang . tay 'llaw na Kulu hya' ga stacis. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh Kulu alang Kulu ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Syurin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 213 buwan, 760 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 728 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 32 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 81%, Amis 5%, Tayan 4%, Bunun 1%, Setik 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kulu hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Kulu hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Kulu hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Kulu hya' ga llynug. tay mkyahu' na Kulu hya' ga Bsuring. tay 'llaw na Kulu hya' ga Tkijig. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh Kulu alang Kulu ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Syurin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 414 buwan, 1,510 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 92% kyan ku 1,383 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 8% kyan ku 127 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 84%, Amis 3%, Tayan 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kulu hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Kulu hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Kulu hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kulu hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Kulu hya' ga Kdusan. tay mkyahu' na Kulu hya' ga Ibuh. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

== Kulu == alang Kulu ga niya mki sku Girang Keng atu Tayto go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 75 buwan, 235 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 80% kyan ku 187 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 20% kyan ku 48 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 72%, Amis 1%, Truku 1%, Puyuma 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Kulu hya' ga Qalang . tay 'llaw na Kulu hya' ga stacis. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh Kulu alang Kulu ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Syurin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 213 buwan, 760 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 728 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 32 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 81%, Amis 5%, Tayan 4%, Bunun 1%, Setik 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kulu hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Kulu hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Kulu hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Kulu hya' ga llynug. tay mkyahu' na Kulu hya' ga Bsuring. tay 'llaw na Kulu hya' ga Tkijig. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh Kulu alang Kulu ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Syurin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 414 buwan, 1,510 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 92% kyan ku 1,383 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 8% kyan ku 127 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 84%, Amis 3%, Tayan 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kulu hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Kulu hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Kulu hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kulu hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Kulu hya' ga Kdusan. tay mkyahu' na Kulu hya' ga Ibuh. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: == kulu == alaŋ kulu ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ɣiraŋ keŋ atu tajto ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, truku *%, pujuma *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkjaħuʔ na kulu ħjaʔ ɣa qalaŋ . taj ʔllaw na kulu ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕtaʦ~ʨis~ɕ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ kulu alaŋ kulu ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕjurin ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, truku **%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%, βunun *%, s~ɕetik *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na kulu ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na kulu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na kulu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkrajaʔ na kulu ħjaʔ ɣa lljnuɣ. taj mkjaħuʔ na kulu ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕuriŋ. taj ʔllaw na kulu ħjaʔ ɣa tkijiɣ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ kulu alaŋ kulu ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕjurin ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, truku **%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na kulu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj ʔzil na kulu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na kulu ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na kulu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkrajaʔ na kulu ħjaʔ ɣa k*us~ɕan. taj mkjaħuʔ na kulu ħjaʔ ɣa iβuħ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
